# CoStar Generated File Map

This file is generated by `npm run docs:file-map`.
The generated file itself is excluded from the file count: `docs/generated-file-map.md`.
Branch and commit metadata are intentionally omitted so the file stays stable after commits and merges.

## Repository Snapshot

- Tracked / public candidate files counted: 235

## Top-Level Map

| Area | File count | Purpose |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| `.github` | 7 | GitHub community, issue, PR, and CI metadata |
| `(root)` | 17 | Repository metadata and entry docs |
| `assets` | 3 | Branding and public assets |
| `bin` | 1 | CLI entrypoint |
| `costar-core` | 61 | Shared core, stores, host-model tools, commits, MCP bridge |
| `docs` | 9 | Public architecture, support, testing, and product notes |
| `examples` | 13 | Public mock examples |
| `integrations` | 43 | Host adapters for Claude, Codex, and OpenClaw |
| `relationship-briefing` | 9 | Brief generation |
| `relationship-capture` | 10 | User-facing import orchestration |
| `relationship-graph` | 17 | Graph and review resolution |
| `relationship-ingestion` | 17 | Extraction and profile review |
| `relationship-profile` | 9 | Durable profile read / write |
| `relationship-roleplay` | 8 | Conversation simulation |
| `relationship-view` | 8 | Persistent markdown views |
| `scripts` | 3 | Checks, smoke tests, and generated docs |

## Important Entrypoints

- `bin/costar.mjs`: CLI for engine mode and host-model installs.
- `costar-core/`: shared stores, commits, host tool contracts, and MCP bridge.
- `integrations/claude/`: Claude host-model bundle.
- `integrations/codex/`: Codex host-model skill bundle.
- `integrations/openclaw/`: OpenClaw host-model bundle.
- `relationship-briefing/`: Briefing runtime and enhanced insight prompt.
- `scripts/check-public-repo.mjs`: public hygiene scanner.
